roadmap.title: Act 1 and the missable Deep Docks duel
roadmap.description: Collect early movement and survival upgrades, grant a first Wish, defeat Lace in Deep Docks before her Citadel meeting, and enter the Citadel through Last Judge.

roadmap.title: Act 2, Citadel song, and pre-Snare endings
roadmap.description: Clear the Citadel bosses and Wishes, establish Bellhome, then earn Weaver Queen and Twisted Child before Soul Snare permanently advances the save.

roadmap.title: Soul Snare and Act 3
roadmap.description: Trigger Snared Silk, learn Beastling Call, finish the Old Hearts and Act 3 character Wishes, claim Everbloom, and defeat Lost Lace.

roadmap.title: Full-world collection and 100%
roadmap.description: Sweep every Tool, upgrade, map, station, Flea, and Journal entry. Use Farsight to verify the exact 100-point ledger before an ending.

roadmap.title: Dedicated speed and Steel Soul profiles
roadmap.description: Run the sub-five-hour route on a fresh save, then combine Steel Soul and Steel Heart on a conservative 100% profile.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Acquire any Tool, such as the Shard Pendant in The Marrow.

guide.context: Tools later occupy Red, Blue, or Yellow Crest slots, but the achievement is awarded on acquisition and does not require a Tool to be equipped.

steps.text: During the long descent through The Marrow, hug the left wall and land on the ledge holding Shard Pendant to collect the Tool.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Acquire the 51 Tools counted by Arsenal, with any upgraded replacement accepted for its original Tool.

guide.context: The game contains temporary and mutually exclusive variants, so the current wiki's achievement total is 51 rather than every inventory object. Upgraded Curveclaw, Silkshot, Druid's Eye, and Claw Mirror forms retain credit.

collectibles.name: Straight Pin
collectibles.method: Open Grindle's cell and collect the Straight Pin above the cell.

collectibles.name: Threefold Pin
collectibles.method: Enter the secret cave above Craw Lake and defeat the Tallcraw guarding the tool.

collectibles.name: Sting Shard
collectibles.method: Pay Forge Daughter 140 Rosaries and one Craftmetal to craft the Sting Shard.

collectibles.name: Tacks
collectibles.method: Complete the Roach Guts Wish and take the Tacks reward.

collectibles.name: Longpin
collectibles.method: Break through the Wood Wasp nest above Bellhart's main entrance and collect the Longpin.

collectibles.name: Curveclaw or Curvesickle
collectibles.method: Buy Curveclaw from Mottled Skarr for 140 Rosaries; its Act 3 Curvesickle replacement also counts.

collectibles.name: Throwing Ring
collectibles.method: Complete Shakra's Trail's End Wish and accept the Throwing Ring reward.

collectibles.name: Pimpillo
collectibles.method: Use one Craftmetal at Yarnaby's hidden crafting room to make Pimpillo.

collectibles.name: Conchcutter
collectibles.method: Finish the Coral Tower route and collect Conchcutter inside the tower.

collectibles.name: Silkshot
collectibles.method: Find the Ruined Tool, then repair one of its three Silkshot variants at Forge Daughter, Twelfth Architect, or Mount Fay.

collectibles.name: Delver's Drill
collectibles.method: Take Delver's Drill from the crafting table.

collectibles.name: Cogwork Wheel
collectibles.method: Pay Twelfth Architect 360 Rosaries and one Craftmetal to craft Cogwork Wheel.

collectibles.name: Cogfly
collectibles.method: Spend one Craftmetal at the High Halls crafting room to build Cogfly.

collectibles.name: Rosary Cannon
collectibles.method: Open the locked room east of the Forum and take Rosary Cannon from the table.

collectibles.name: Voltvessels
collectibles.method: Break the concealed wall and collect Voltvessels.

collectibles.name: Flintslate
collectibles.method: Reach the eastern Deep Docks tool room and collect Flintslate.

collectibles.name: Flea Brew
collectibles.method: Rescue five Fleas and speak with Fleamaster Mooshka for Flea Brew.

collectibles.name: Plasmium Phial
collectibles.method: Complete the Alchemist's Assistant Wish and take Plasmium Phial.

collectibles.name: Druid's Eye or Druid's Eyes
collectibles.method: Complete Berry Picking for Druid's Eye; the upgraded Druid's Eyes replacement also counts.

collectibles.name: Magma Bell
collectibles.method: Pay Forge Daughter 110 Rosaries and one Craftmetal to craft Magma Bell.

collectibles.name: Warding Bell
collectibles.method: Reach the exposed Far Fields platform and collect Warding Bell.

collectibles.name: Pollip Pouch
collectibles.method: Complete the Rite of the Pollip Wish and accept Pollip Pouch.

collectibles.name: Fractured Mask
collectibles.method: Buy Fractured Mask from Mottled Skarr for 260 Rosaries, or collect the relocated copy above his Act 3 room.

collectibles.name: Multibinder
collectibles.method: Complete My Missing Courier, then buy Multibinder from Frey for 880 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Weavelight
collectibles.method: Defeat Moss Mother and take Weavelight.

collectibles.name: Sawtooth Circlet
collectibles.method: Pay Twelfth Architect 230 Rosaries and one Craftmetal to craft Sawtooth Circlet.

collectibles.name: Injector Band
collectibles.method: Take Injector Band from the Whiteward table.

collectibles.name: Spool Extender
collectibles.method: Buy Spool Extender from Jubilana for 720 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Reserve Bind
collectibles.method: Defeat the Second Sentinel and take Reserve Bind.

collectibles.name: Claw Mirror or Claw Mirrors
collectibles.method: Defeat Trobbio; either the original or upgraded Claw Mirrors version counts.

collectibles.name: Memory Crystal
collectibles.method: Break the ice wall and collect Memory Crystal.

collectibles.name: Snitch Pick
collectibles.method: Buy Snitch Pick from Grindle for 740 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Volt Filament
collectibles.method: Defeat Voltvyrm and take Volt Filament.

collectibles.name: Quick Sling
collectibles.method: Break the concealed ceiling and collect Quick Sling.

collectibles.name: Wreath of Purity
collectibles.method: Traverse the Ducts tool chamber and collect Wreath of Purity.

collectibles.name: Longclaw
collectibles.method: Complete the Broodfeast Wish and take Longclaw.

collectibles.name: Wispfire Lantern
collectibles.method: Defeat Father of the Flame in western Wisp Thicket.

collectibles.name: Egg of Flealia
collectibles.method: Complete Lost Fleas and accept Egg of Flealia.

collectibles.name: Pin Badge
collectibles.method: During Act 3, complete Fatal Resolve and defeat Pinstress.

collectibles.name: Compass
collectibles.method: Buy Compass from Shakra for 70 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Shard Pendant
collectibles.method: Collect Shard Pendant from the ledge beside the long Marrow descent.

collectibles.name: Magnetite Brooch
collectibles.method: Buy Magnetite Brooch from Pebb for 120 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Weighted Belt
collectibles.method: Buy Weighted Belt from Mort for 160 Rosaries, or recover the belt from his Act 3 location.

collectibles.name: Barbed Bracelet
collectibles.method: Take Barbed Bracelet from the bug corpse.

collectibles.name: Dead Bug's Purse or Shell Satchel
collectibles.method: Collect Dead Bug's Purse in normal mode or Shell Satchel from the same place in Steel Soul.

collectibles.name: Magnetite Dice
collectibles.method: Win Lumble's game several consecutive times, or buy Magnetite Dice from Grindle in Act 3.

collectibles.name: Scuttlebrace
collectibles.method: Pay Twelfth Architect 140 Rosaries and one Craftmetal to craft Scuttlebrace.

collectibles.name: Ascendant's Grip
collectibles.method: Complete The Wandering Merchant, then buy Ascendant's Grip from Jubilana for 350 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Spider Strings
collectibles.method: Complete The Wandering Merchant, then buy Spider Strings from Jubilana for 320 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Silkspeed Anklets
collectibles.method: Sprint through the full timed room in the Far Fields weavenest.

collectibles.name: Thief's Mark
collectibles.method: Buy Thief's Mark from Grindle for 350 Rosaries.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Bind any Silk Skill, with Silkspear at the Mosshome door serving as the earliest unlock.

guide.context: Every Silk Skill consumes four Silk and must be bound before use; six skills count toward Woven.

steps.text: Reach the sealed Mosshome door from Moss Grotto and complete the binding sequence to obtain Silkspear.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Bind Pale Nails, Rune Rage, Sharpdart, Cross Stitch, Thread Storm, and Silkspear.

guide.context: Pale Nails is Act 3 content; the other five skills can be collected before the Snared Silk ending.

collectibles.name: Silkspear
collectibles.method: Complete the binding sequence at the sealed Mosshome door.

collectibles.name: Thread Storm
collectibles.method: Enter Craw Lake's upper chamber and bind Thread Storm.

collectibles.name: Cross Stitch
collectibles.method: Defeat Phantom in Exhaust Organ and bind Cross Stitch.

collectibles.name: Sharpdart
collectibles.method: Open the weavenest route and bind Sharpdart.

collectibles.name: Rune Rage
collectibles.method: Use the Key of Heretic to reach First Sinner, defeat the boss, and bind Rune Rage.

collectibles.name: Pale Nails
collectibles.method: Return with Silk Soar and bind Grand Mother Silk's remaining arm.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Claim a non-default Crest, such as Beast Crest after Hunter's March's arena.

guide.context: Hunter Crest is owned from the beginning and counts toward Consumed, but Claimed requires collecting another Crest.

steps.text: Enter the Hunter's March Crest arena, finish its platforming and combat trial, and claim Beast Crest from the shrine.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Claim Hunter, Beast, Reaper, Wanderer, Witch, Architect, and Shaman Crests.

guide.context: Cursed Crest is a temporary state on the Witch route, while Vesticrest is Eva's separate Tool-slot system; neither adds an eighth achievement Crest.

collectibles.name: Hunter Crest
collectibles.method: Keep the default Hunter Crest; the game counts the starting Crest.

collectibles.name: Beast Crest
collectibles.method: Complete the Crest arena and claim Beast Crest.

collectibles.name: Reaper Crest
collectibles.method: Complete the Greymoor Crest arena and claim Reaper Crest.

collectibles.name: Wanderer Crest
collectibles.method: Complete the Bonegrave Crest arena and claim Wanderer Crest.

collectibles.name: Witch Crest
collectibles.method: Complete Rite of Rebirth for Cursed Crest, then complete Infestation Operation to evolve Witch Crest.

collectibles.name: Architect Crest
collectibles.method: Own at least 25 Tools, buy Architect's Key for 110 Rosaries, open the chapel, and claim Architect Crest.

collectibles.name: Shaman Crest
collectibles.method: Obtain Silk Soar, return to the Snail Shamans' chapel, and claim Shaman Crest.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Collect four Mask Shards to form one additional Mask.

guide.context: Mask Shards convert automatically in groups of four; five completed Masks are available from 20 shards.

steps.text: Buy Pebb's Bone Bottom shard for 300 Rosaries and collect three more early shards from lower Wormways, the Marrow–Deep Docks passage, and above the Far Fields Seamstress.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Collect all 20 Mask Shards to form five additional Masks.

guide.context: Seven shards require late movement abilities or Act 3 Wishes, so the set cannot be finished during Act 2.

collectibles.name: Shard 1
collectibles.method: Buy the shard from Pebb for 300 Rosaries; Grindle sells the relocated Act 3 shard for 320.

collectibles.name: Shard 2
collectibles.method: Enter through Mosshome and break the wall before the Simple Key door.

collectibles.name: Shard 3
collectibles.method: Use Cling Grip to climb the passage and reach the shard.

collectibles.name: Shard 4
collectibles.method: Use Drifter's Cloak above the Seamstress to reach the shard.

collectibles.name: Shard 5
collectibles.method: Break the concealed wall and finish the platforming room.

collectibles.name: Shard 6
collectibles.method: Open Atla with Needolin, then break the interior wall.

collectibles.name: Shard 7
collectibles.method: Complete The Wandering Merchant and buy the shard from Jubilana for 750 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Shard 8
collectibles.method: Defeat Cogwork Dancers and clear the combat gauntlet.

collectibles.name: Shard 9
collectibles.method: Solve the central moving-box puzzle.

collectibles.name: Shard 10
collectibles.method: Complete Savage Beastfly after defeating Fourth Chorus and Savage Beastfly.

collectibles.name: Shard 11
collectibles.method: Use Clawline and Drifter's Cloak to cross Skull Cave.

collectibles.name: Shard 12
collectibles.method: Use Faydown Cloak west of the bench.

collectibles.name: Shard 13
collectibles.method: Use the Key of Apostate and Faydown Cloak; Silk Soar provides a shortcut.

collectibles.name: Shard 14
collectibles.method: Cross the Slubberlug hall and collect the shard.

collectibles.name: Shard 15
collectibles.method: Use Faydown Cloak through the eastern platforming route.

collectibles.name: Shard 16
collectibles.method: Use Clawline and Faydown Cloak; Silk Soar provides a shortcut.

collectibles.name: Shard 17
collectibles.method: Use Silk Soar to enter Brightvein and reach the shard.

collectibles.name: Shard 18
collectibles.method: Complete Fastest in Pharloom.

collectibles.name: Shard 19
collectibles.method: Complete Awaiting the End, then finish the Dark Hearts Wish.

collectibles.name: Shard 20
collectibles.method: Meet Skarrsinger Karmelita, then complete Hidden Hunter.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Collect two Spool Fragments to increase Hornet's Silk capacity once.

guide.context: Spool Fragments convert automatically in pairs, producing nine total Silk-capacity upgrades from 18 fragments.

steps.text: Break the mossy wall above Bone Bottom for one fragment, then complete the burning-floor lever route southwest of Forge Daughter in Deep Docks for a second fragment.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Collect all 18 Spool Fragments to complete nine Silk-capacity upgrades.

guide.context: The final fragments require Faydown Cloak, Clawline, White Key access, completed Wishes, or late-game merchants.

collectibles.name: Fragment 1
collectibles.method: Break the wall in the mossy room above town.

collectibles.name: Fragment 2
collectibles.method: Use the lever and platforms above the burning floor southwest of Forge Daughter.

collectibles.name: Fragment 3
collectibles.method: Use Cling Grip above Shakra's bench and cross the balloon route.

collectibles.name: Fragment 4
collectibles.method: Complete My Missing Courier, then buy the fragment from Frey for 270 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Fragment 5
collectibles.method: Open the weavenest with Needolin and finish the inner passage.

collectibles.name: Fragment 6
collectibles.method: Use Cling Grip and the Slab transport route from its Bellway.

collectibles.name: Fragment 7
collectibles.method: Solve the scales puzzle at the top of Grand Gate.

collectibles.name: Fragment 8
collectibles.method: Clear the combat gauntlet west of the main shaft.

collectibles.name: Fragment 9
collectibles.method: Rescue 12 Fleas, defeat Last Judge, and collect the caravan reward at Grand Gate.

collectibles.name: Fragment 10
collectibles.method: Use the White Key route and search below the lift.

collectibles.name: Fragment 11
collectibles.method: Finish the southeast machinery route.

collectibles.name: Fragment 12
collectibles.method: Cross the burning floor and break the western wall.

collectibles.name: Fragment 13
collectibles.method: Complete Balm for the Wounded, obtain the White Key, and speak with Sherma.

collectibles.name: Fragment 14
collectibles.method: Complete The Lost Merchant, then buy the fragment from Jubilana for 500 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Fragment 15
collectibles.method: Use Clawline to open the gate, break the explosive rock, and finish the spike-and-lava route with Cling Grip.

collectibles.name: Fragment 16
collectibles.method: Use Faydown Cloak and Clawline to reach the top of the western shaft; Silk Soar skips the challenge.

collectibles.name: Fragment 17
collectibles.method: Go west from the fourth floor, use Faydown Cloak and Clawline around the spikes, then break the southern vines.

collectibles.name: Fragment 18
collectibles.method: Use Faydown Cloak and Cling Grip to reach Grindle, then buy the fragment for 680 Rosaries.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Bell Beast, The Unravelled, and Lace, then complete each Silk Heart memory.

guide.context: Touching a spawned Silk Heart locks Hornet into a Cradle-like platforming memory; the Heart is awarded only after reaching the memory's exit.

collectibles.name: Bell Beast Heart
collectibles.method: Obtain Silkspear, defeat Bell Beast, touch the Heart, and finish the memory climb.

collectibles.name: Unravelled Heart
collectibles.method: Use the Surgeon's Key to reach The Unravelled, defeat the boss, and finish the Heart memory.

collectibles.name: Lace Heart
collectibles.method: Learn the Threefold Melody, defeat Lace in the Cradle, and finish the Heart memory.

achievements.description: Acquire a map of each area
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Acquire the map for each of Pharloom's 28 mapped areas.

guide.context: Most maps come from Shakra; Citadel maps use machines, and several late areas use fixed pickups. Choral Chambers has two purchase positions but remains one area map.

collectibles.name: Mosslands
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 40 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: The Marrow
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 50 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Deep Docks
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 50 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Far Fields
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 50 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Wormways
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 70 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Hunter's March
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 70 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Greymoor
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 70 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Bellhart
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 40 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Shellwood
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 70 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Blasted Steps
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 70 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Sinner's Road
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 90 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Mount Fay
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 40 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Sands of Karak
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 90 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Bilewater
collectibles.method: Buy the map from Shakra for 90 Rosaries.

collectibles.name: Grand Gate
collectibles.method: Pay 40 Rosaries at the area's Citadel map machine.

collectibles.name: Choral Chambers
collectibles.method: Pay 70 Rosaries at either of the area's map machines.

collectibles.name: Whispering Vaults
collectibles.method: Pay 70 Rosaries at the area's Citadel map machine.

collectibles.name: Whiteward
collectibles.method: Pay 70 Rosaries at the area's Citadel map machine.

collectibles.name: High Halls
collectibles.method: Pay 70 Rosaries at the area's Citadel map machine.

collectibles.name: Memorium
collectibles.method: Pay 70 Rosaries at the area's Citadel map machine.

collectibles.name: Cradle
collectibles.method: Pay 70 Rosaries at the Act 2 machine, or collect the free map beside its broken Act 3 machine.

collectibles.name: Underworks
collectibles.method: Take the free map from the map board.

collectibles.name: Putrified Ducts
collectibles.method: Take the free map from the desk.

collectibles.name: Verdania
collectibles.method: Take the free map at the abandoned camp before starting the memory route.

collectibles.name: Cogwork Core
collectibles.method: Activate the mechanism that provides the free map.

collectibles.name: Slab
collectibles.method: Use the Key of Indolent to enter the room and read the map etched on the dead bug's shell.

collectibles.name: Weavenest Atla
collectibles.method: Read the free map tablet inside the weavenest.

collectibles.name: Abyss
collectibles.method: Read the free map tablet during the Act 3 descent.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Open the 10 Bellway stations tracked by Connected.

guide.context: Bone Bottom and The Marrow become available with Bell Beast and do not add paid activations; the achievement tracks the other ten stations.

collectibles.name: Deep Docks
collectibles.method: Pay 40 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

collectibles.name: Far Fields
collectibles.method: Pay 40 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

collectibles.name: Greymoor
collectibles.method: Pay 60 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

collectibles.name: Bellhart
collectibles.method: Pay 60 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

collectibles.name: Shellwood
collectibles.method: Pay 40 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

collectibles.name: Blasted Steps
collectibles.method: Pay 60 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

collectibles.name: The Slab
collectibles.method: Pay 40 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

collectibles.name: Grand Bellway
collectibles.method: Pay 80 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

collectibles.name: Bilewater
collectibles.method: Pay 80 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

collectibles.name: Putrified Ducts
collectibles.method: Pay 80 Rosaries and strike the station bell to activate the stop.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Learn Beastling Call after defeating Bell Eater during Act 3.

guide.context: Snared Silk opens Act 3 and changes the Bellway journey that exposes Bell Eater; Beastling Call later summons the Beastlings.

steps.text: After entering Act 3, use a Bellway and drop through the newly opened hole on the route.
Defeat Bell Eater and complete the scene with the Bell Beast to learn Beastling Call.

achievements.description: Open all of the Citadel's Ventrica Stations
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Open the six Citadel Ventrica Stations tracked by Transported.

guide.context: Terminus is the network entry point and does not add a seventh paid activation to the current achievement counter.

collectibles.name: Memorium
collectibles.method: Pay the station fare and activate the Ventrica stop.

collectibles.name: High Halls
collectibles.method: Pay the station fare and activate the Ventrica stop.

collectibles.name: First Shrine
collectibles.method: Pay the station fare and activate the Ventrica stop.

collectibles.name: Choral Chambers
collectibles.method: Pay the station fare and activate the Ventrica stop.

collectibles.name: Grand Bellway
collectibles.method: Pay the station fare and activate the Ventrica stop.

collectibles.name: Underworks
collectibles.method: Pay the station fare and activate the Ventrica stop.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Record 100 Hunter's Journal entries, then return to Nuu in Halfway Home.

guide.context: Keen Hunter needs an entry for each creature, not the extra kills that master an entry for True Hunter.

steps.text: Meet Nuu on Halfway Home's second floor in Greymoor and accept her Wish to receive the Hunter's Journal.
Defeat 100 distinct creatures so 100 entries appear, then speak with Nuu again.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Master every required Hunter's Journal entry, then receive Hunter's Memento from Nuu.

guide.context: Flintbeetle, Palestag, Shakra, Summoned Saviour, Garmond and Zaza, Lost Garmond, and Lost Lace are excluded from the Memento requirement.

steps.text: Defeat each required creature enough times to reveal the additional notes on its Journal entry.
Return to Nuu in Halfway Home after every required entry is mastered and accept Hunter's Memento.

achievements.description: Rescue half of Pharloom's lost fleas
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Rescue any 15 of Pharloom's 30 lost Fleas.

guide.context: Rescued Fleas join the caravan permanently, so the first-half counter can be accumulated across the entire save.

steps.text: Open cages, break containers or vines, and finish any required fights until the caravan roster reaches 15 rescued Fleas.

achievements.description: Rescue all of Pharloom's lost fleas and receive their final gift
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Rescue all 30 lost Fleas, move the caravan to Fleatopia, and receive the final gift.

guide.context: The rescue counter alone is insufficient: the caravan moves at milestones and the final reward is awarded only after the Fleatopia conclusion.

collectibles.name: Flea 1
collectibles.method: Finish the Bell Beast route, then complete the nearby platforming section.

collectibles.name: Flea 2
collectibles.method: Break the wall left of the Bellway.

collectibles.name: Flea 3
collectibles.method: Pull the lever left of Swift Step and open the container.

collectibles.name: Flea 4
collectibles.method: Use Clawline to enter the lower door and clear the gauntlet.

collectibles.name: Flea 5
collectibles.method: Enter through the Skarrgard route and finish the cage platforming.

collectibles.name: Flea 6
collectibles.method: Spring the Skarr Scout trap and free the captive Flea.

collectibles.name: Flea 7
collectibles.method: Use Drifter's Cloak and Cling Grip through the secret route behind the Bellway.

collectibles.name: Flea 8
collectibles.method: Strike the Aknid carrying the Flea and free the captive.

collectibles.name: Flea 9
collectibles.method: Cross the balloon route and clear the Craw Lake gauntlet.

collectibles.name: Flea 10
collectibles.method: Use Cling Grip to climb the western tower.

collectibles.name: Flea 11
collectibles.method: Break the wall above Halfway Home and use Cling Grip to reach Kratt.

collectibles.name: Flea 12
collectibles.method: Defeat Sister Splinter, then climb the upper Bellveins with Cling Grip.

collectibles.name: Flea 13
collectibles.method: Approach the chamber below Gahlia from the tower's upper entrance.

collectibles.name: Flea 14
collectibles.method: Use Cling Grip in the room left of the Bellway.

collectibles.name: Flea 15
collectibles.method: Defeat the nearby Muckroach and open the cage.

collectibles.name: Flea 16
collectibles.method: Break the wall and defeat both Snitchflies.

collectibles.name: Flea 17
collectibles.method: Complete the Mist, enter Exhaust Organ, and use its secret passage to the upper entrance.

collectibles.name: Flea 18
collectibles.method: Use Cling Grip above the secret bench room.

collectibles.name: Flea 19
collectibles.method: Enter from Wisp Thicket, break the ceiling, and use Cling Grip plus Faydown Cloak.

collectibles.name: Flea 20
collectibles.method: Cross the Cogwork Hauler room and open the container.

collectibles.name: Flea 21
collectibles.method: Complete the cage platforming section.

collectibles.name: Flea 22
collectibles.method: Break the wall and use Drifter's Cloak; needle-bouncing across the saws also reaches the Flea.

collectibles.name: Flea 23
collectibles.method: Use Faydown Cloak to enter the chamber, free Huge Flea, and defeat the resulting boss.

collectibles.name: Flea 24
collectibles.method: Enter the mist-covered door and open the cage.

collectibles.name: Flea 25
collectibles.method: Use Faydown Cloak to reach the small chamber above-left of the bench.

collectibles.name: Flea 26
collectibles.method: Use Cling Grip to reach the ice block, then strike the ice until the Flea is free.

collectibles.name: Flea 27
collectibles.method: Break the encrusted coral on the upper-right route; Silk Soar offers another entrance.

collectibles.name: Flea 28
collectibles.method: Let the Barnak pull Hornet upward, finish the platforming, and speak with Vog.

collectibles.name: Flea 29
collectibles.method: Jump behind the curtains below Cardinius, then complete the long Clawline and Cling Grip route.

collectibles.name: Flea 30
collectibles.method: Move the room's western box into position, use the box to climb upward, and open the cage at the summit.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Bell Beast in The Marrow and collect the resulting Silk Heart.

guide.context: Silkspear breaks the web sealing Bell Beast's route from Mosshome; the Heart memory must be completed before the arena reopens.

steps.text: Bind Silkspear in Mosshome, break the webbed barrier into The Marrow, and defeat Bell Beast.
Touch the spawned Silk Heart and reach the end of its memory platforming sequence.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Lace in Deep Docks before speaking with Lace in the Citadel.

guide.context: This optional Deep Docks encounter becomes unavailable after Lace's Citadel meeting, making Pharloom's Welcome missable on that save.

steps.text: Enter Deep Docks from the bottom-east of The Marrow, cross the lava platforms to Lace's arena, and win the fight before reaching Lace in the Citadel.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Fourth Chorus at the end of Far Fields.

guide.context: The route follows the Seamstress's Flexile Spines Wish and the Drifter's Cloak traversal across Far Fields.

steps.text: Bring the Seamstress the requested Flexile Spines, obtain Drifter's Cloak, cross the eastern lava route, and defeat Fourth Chorus.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Widow in Bellhart to obtain Needolin.

guide.context: Cling Grip from Shellwood opens the upper Bellhart route; Needolin then unlocks song doors and story progression.

steps.text: Defeat Sister Splinter in Shellwood, obtain Cling Grip, climb into upper Bellhart, and defeat Widow.
Complete the post-fight sequence to receive Needolin.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Last Judge at the summit of Blasted Steps.

guide.context: Needolin and the five activated bell benches open the Citadel approach at the end of Act 1.

steps.text: Obtain Needolin, activate the five bell benches on the ascent, reach the top of Blasted Steps, and defeat Last Judge.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Cogwork Dancers in the central Citadel.

guide.context: The fight becomes reachable after Last Judge opens the Citadel and the Underworks route reaches Choral Chambers.

steps.text: Enter the Citadel, climb from Underworks into Choral Chambers, reach the central dancers' hall, and defeat Cogwork Dancers.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Trobbio in Whispering Vaults.

guide.context: Cogwork Dancers open the route deeper into the Citadel; Trobbio's first defeat awards Claw Mirror.

steps.text: Enter Whispering Vaults after Cogwork Dancers, navigate to Trobbio's theatre, and win the staged boss fight.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Lace in the Cradle after learning the Threefold Melody.

guide.context: Playing the completed Citadel song opens the Cradle route and makes the second Lace battle mandatory for the first endings.

steps.text: Collect the Conductor's, Vaultkeeper's, and Architect's melodies, play the Threefold Melody in Cogwork Dancers' hall, then climb the Cradle and defeat Lace.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Navigate the Mist and defeat Phantom at the top of Exhaust Organ.

guide.context: White butterflies mark the safe Mist route; playing Needolin in each correct room reveals the next passage.

steps.text: Enter the Mist from Sinner's Road, follow the white butterflies, play Needolin through the labyrinth, and reach Exhaust Organ.
Climb to the organ's summit and defeat Phantom.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Use the Key of Heretic in The Slab and defeat First Sinner.

guide.context: The key is in the Slab's upper section, while the boss door is in the lower prison route; victory awards Rune Rage.

steps.text: Collect the Key of Heretic from upper Slab, open the locked lower door, and defeat First Sinner.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: During Act 3, overcome Crust King Khann after clearing Sands of Karak's full route.

guide.context: This Old Hearts target requires Silk Soar, the Raging Conchfly encounter, and Coral Tower's three combat arenas.

steps.text: During Act 3, enter Sands of Karak with Silk Soar, defeat Raging Conchfly, clear all three Coral Tower arenas, and defeat Crust King Khann.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Nyleth beneath Grand Gate during the Act 3 Old Hearts quest.

guide.context: Shrine Guardian Seth blocks Nyleth's hidden route, and Elegy of the Deep exposes the memory encounter.

steps.text: During Act 3, find the concealed shrine below Grand Gate, defeat Shrine Guardian Seth, use Elegy of the Deep, and defeat Nyleth.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Use Silk Soar in Hunter's March and defeat Skarrsinger Karmelita.

guide.context: Karmelita is one of the optional Act 3 Old Hearts targets and waits by the Hunter's March statue route east of The Marrow.

steps.text: During Act 3, travel east from The Marrow to the Hunter's March statue, use Silk Soar to reach Karmelita, and win the fight.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Verdania's memory route and defeat Clover Dancers.

guide.context: Green Prince must first be freed from Sinner's Road with a Simple Key and met in Cogwork Dancers' arena before his Act 3 Craw Lake appearance.

steps.text: Free Green Prince from Sinner's Road, speak with him in Cogwork Dancers' hall, then find him at Craw Lake during Act 3.
Obtain Verdania's map before playing Elegy of the Deep, collect two flower, three statue, and one shrine essence, defeat Palestag, enter Green Prince's home, and defeat Clover Dancers.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Grant any Wish, with Berry Picking's three Mossberries serving as the earliest option.

guide.context: Wish completion is recorded when the requesting NPC accepts the objective and gives the reward, not when the Wish is merely accepted.

steps.text: Speak with Moss Druid in Moss Grotto, accept Berry Picking, collect three Mossberries, and return all three Mossberries to Moss Druid.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Deliver the five requested dishes to Loyal Mergwin and satisfy the Great Gourmand.

guide.context: Great Taste of Pharloom starts from Loyal Mergwin in Choral Chambers; Courier's Rasher can be spoiled by taking too much damage during delivery.

collectibles.name: Mossberry Stew
collectibles.method: Complete Moss Druid's Mossberry objective and collect the prepared dish.

collectibles.name: Vintage Nectar
collectibles.method: Pay 480 Rosaries for cellar access and collect the nectar.

collectibles.name: Pickled Muckmaggot
collectibles.method: Complete Lugoli's requirement and take the dish.

collectibles.name: Courier's Rasher
collectibles.method: Complete the courier assignment and deliver the rasher while avoiding excessive damage.

collectibles.name: Crustnut
collectibles.method: Break through the spike-lined secret route and collect Crustnut.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Shakra's Trail's End Wish in upper Bilewater.

guide.context: The Wish appears in Bellhart after the required Shakra encounters and map purchases; her scattered throwing rings lead toward her master.

steps.text: Buy Shakra's available maps and meet her along the route until Trail's End appears on Bellhart's Wish board.
In upper-eastern Bilewater, follow Shakra's throwing rings, reach her master, and play Needolin to complete the song-sending scene.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Accept Hero's Call and defeat Lost Garmond in Act 3.

guide.context: The Bellhart Wish appears after the earlier Garmond and Zaza encounters in Greymoor and Shellwood.

steps.text: During Act 3, finish the Garmond and Zaza encounters until Hero's Call appears on Bellhart's board, then accept the Wish.
Travel to the Blasted Steps Bellway, follow Zaza to Lost Garmond, and defeat Lost Garmond.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Accept Fatal Resolve and defeat Pinstress at Mount Fay during Act 3.

guide.context: Pinstress must first be found in the large Blasted Steps house immediately before the Sands of Karak ascent.

steps.text: Accept Fatal Resolve from Bellhart's board and speak with Pinstress in the Blasted Steps house.
Travel from the Slab Bellway toward Mount Fay, wake Pinstress, finish her dialogue, and win the duel.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Unlock 32 Tool slots across non-Hunter Crests, then bind Eva in Weavenest Atla.

guide.context: Starting slots on the six other Crests count; efficient allocation needs at least 12 of the 20 Memory Lockets, while spending lockets on Hunter Crest can raise the requirement to 18.

steps.text: Obtain Needolin, open Weavenest Atla, meet Eva, and allow Eva to inspect and enhance Hunter Crest.
Claim the six non-Hunter Crests and spend Memory Lockets until their combined unlocked slots reach 32.
Return to Eva without Plasmium or Cursed Crest blocking access, accept the binding, and receive Sylphsong.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Bellhart's restoration chain and receive the Bellhome key from Pavo.

guide.context: Pavo's final dialogue can require leaving Bellhart and returning after Widow and both repair Wishes are complete.

steps.text: Complete Bone Bottom's repair Wish for 200 Shell Shards, defeat Widow, and complete Restoration of Bellhart for 250 Rosaries.
Return to Pavo near the Bellway, exhaust his dialogue until he gives the key, then unlock the upper Bellhart residence.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Collect the Conductor's, Vaultkeeper's, and Architect's melodies, then play the Threefold Melody.

guide.context: Cogwork Dancers' defeat activates the central statue that records the three Citadel melody components.

collectibles.name: Conductor's Melody
collectibles.method: Clear the Forum battle and collect the melody.

collectibles.name: Vaultkeeper's Melody
collectibles.method: Obtain Sacred Cylinder, deliver it to Vaultkeeper Cardinius, and collect the melody.

collectibles.name: Architect's Melody
collectibles.method: Solve the three-pillar machinery puzzle at the top of Cogwork Core.

collectibles.name: Threefold Melody
collectibles.method: Return to the central statue and play the completed song.

achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Collect three Old Hearts, finish the Red Memory, and claim Everbloom.

guide.context: Any three of the Karmelita, Khann, Nyleth, and Clover Dancers Old Heart routes satisfy the Snail Shamans' Act 3 request.

steps.text: Defeat three Old Heart targets and return their Hearts to the Snail Shamans in Moss Grotto.
Enter the Red Memory, complete its platforming and encounter sequence, and take Everbloom at the end.

achievements.description: Defeat Grand Mother Silk and bind her power.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Grand Mother Silk and choose Bind before completing Snared Silk.

guide.context: After this ending, the save reloads before Grand Mother Silk, so other pre-Act 3 endings remain available on the same profile.

steps.text: Reach Grand Mother Silk through the Cradle without completing the Soul Snare route, defeat her, and choose Bind to accept her power.

achievements.description: Entrap Grand Mother Silk with the Soul Snare.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Silk and Soul, defeat Grand Mother Silk, and play Needolin to activate the Soul Snare.

guide.context: Snared Silk permanently advances the profile to Act 3 and prevents Weaver Queen and Twisted Child on that profile, so finish those endings first.

steps.text: Complete the required Wish-board route, move at least 25 Fleas toward Fleatopia, and accept Silk and Soul in Songclave.

Collect Maiden's Soul after Skull Tyrant, Hermit's Soul beyond Bell Beast's Bellhart passage, Seeker's Soul from its arena, and Snare Setter from the Needolin door; return the components to the caretaker.
Defeat Grand Mother Silk and play Needolin at the ending prompt to trigger Soul Snare.

achievements.description: Defeat Grand Mother Silk while cursed.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Obtain Cursed Crest through Rite of Rebirth and defeat Grand Mother Silk while the curse remains active.

guide.context: Completing Infestation Operation converts Cursed Crest into Witch Crest and removes this ending condition; Snared Silk also closes the route.

steps.text: Complete Rite of the Pollip by collecting six Pollip Hearts, then bring Twisted Bud from the Whispering Vaults–Bilewater descent to Greyroot for Rite of Rebirth.
Accept Cursed Crest, avoid Infestation Operation, reach Grand Mother Silk before Snared Silk, and defeat her while Cursed Crest is equipped.

achievements.description: Defeat Lost Lace and free Pharloom.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Enter the Abyss during Act 3, defeat Lost Lace, and complete Sister of the Void.

guide.context: Everbloom protects Hornet during the Last Dive; this is the main Act 3 ending and reloads at the Abyss bench.

steps.text: Collect three Old Hearts, claim Everbloom, reach the Last Dive, and descend into the Abyss.
Traverse the Abyss, defeat Lost Lace, and finish the ending sequence.

achievements.description: Grant the Herald's Wish and finish the game.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Mister Mushroom's seven meetings, then finish any ending to trigger Passing of the Age.

guide.context: The March 2026 achievement clarification confirms that finishing the Herald's Wish alone is insufficient; an ending must play afterward.

collectibles.name: Meeting 1
collectibles.method: Find Mister Mushroom right of the Snail Shaman shrine and play Needolin.

collectibles.name: Meeting 2
collectibles.method: Find Mister Mushroom above town and play Needolin.

collectibles.name: Meeting 3
collectibles.method: Find Mister Mushroom before the Needolin gate and play Needolin.

collectibles.name: Meeting 4
collectibles.method: Climb above Greymoor's towers and play Needolin beside Mister Mushroom.

collectibles.name: Meeting 5
collectibles.method: Return to the First Sinner area and play Needolin beside Mister Mushroom.

collectibles.name: Meeting 6
collectibles.method: Reach the summit near the Faydown Cloak site and play Needolin.

collectibles.name: Meeting 7
collectibles.method: Use the late movement abilities above Grand Mother Silk's arena, reach Mister Mushroom, and play Needolin.

collectibles.name: Ending
collectibles.method: Finish an ending after the seventh meeting and watch the extra Passing of the Age scene.

achievements.description: Achieve 100% game completion and finish the game
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Reach exactly 100% completion, then finish an ending on that save.

guide.context: Farsight from the Abyss displays completion in the menu. Act 2 stops at 93%; seven points require Act 3, so this cannot unlock before Snared Silk.

collectibles.name: Tools
collectibles.method: Acquire all 51 counted Tools for 51%.

collectibles.name: Silk Skills
collectibles.method: Bind all six Silk Skills for 6%.

collectibles.name: Tool upgrades
collectibles.method: Acquire four Crafting Kit and four Tool Pouch upgrades for 8%.

collectibles.name: Silk Hearts
collectibles.method: Complete the three Silk Heart memories for 3%.

collectibles.name: Crests
collectibles.method: Claim the six non-default Crests for 6%.

collectibles.name: Abilities
collectibles.method: Acquire Needolin, Swift Step, Cling Grip, Clawline, Silk Soar, Sylphsong, and Needle Strike for 7%.

collectibles.name: Masks
collectibles.method: Collect 20 Mask Shards for five Mask upgrades and 5%.

collectibles.name: Silk Spools
collectibles.method: Collect 18 Spool Fragments for nine Spool upgrades and 9%.

collectibles.name: Needle
collectibles.method: Acquire all four Needle upgrades for 4%.

collectibles.name: Everbloom
collectibles.method: Claim Everbloom for the final 1%.

collectibles.name: Ending
collectibles.method: Confirm Farsight shows 100%, then finish the game.

achievements.description: Complete the game in under 5 hours
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Finish any ending with the save timer below five hours.

guide.context: The achievement uses in-game time; the pause menu, map, and inventory stop the clock according to the post-patch achievement guide.

steps.text: Route through Bone Bottom and Marrow for Silkspear and Bell Beast, then Deep Docks for Swift Step and Lace.
Cross Far Fields for Drifter's Cloak and Fourth Chorus, defeat Moorwing in Greymoor, and traverse Shellwood–Bellhart for Cling Grip, Widow, and Needolin.
Solve the Mist, defeat Phantom, defeat Last Judge at the summit of Blasted Steps, enter the Citadel, then defeat Cogwork Dancers and Trobbio.

Obtain Vaultkeeper's Melody by delivering Sacred Cylinder in Whispering Vaults, Conductor's Melody after the High Halls Forum battle, and Architect's Melody from Cogwork Core's pillar puzzle; play the completed Threefold Melody in Cogwork Dancers' hall.
Defeat Lace in the Cradle and choose Bind after defeating Grand Mother Silk before the save timer reaches five hours.

achievements.description: Achieve 100% game completion and finish the game in under 30 hours
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Reach 100% completion and finish an ending before the save timer reaches 30 hours.

guide.context: Because the completion ledger totals exactly 100, no optional percentage buffer exists; route every required Tool and upgrade before committing to the final ending.

steps.text: Group the route by Moss Grotto, Marrow, Deep Docks, Far Fields, Greymoor, Shellwood, Sinner's Road, Citadel, Mount Fay, and Act 3 cleanup.

Collect 51 Tools, six Silk Skills, four Crafting Kits, four Tool Pouches, three Silk Hearts, six non-default Crests, seven counted abilities, 20 Mask Shards, 18 Spool Fragments, four Needle upgrades, and Everbloom.
Use Farsight to verify 100%, then finish Sister of the Void or another available ending while the save timer remains below 30 hours.

achievements.description: Finish the game in Steel Soul mode
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Finish any ending in Steel Soul mode without a permanent death.

guide.context: Steel Soul unlocks after one ending; on Extras, the shortcut alternates Up and Down twice, followed by Left and Right twice. Most deaths erase the profile, although First Sinner, Shakra, Garmond and Zaza, and Elegy memories are explicit exceptions; being knocked into spikes during those fights still counts as real death.

steps.text: Start a new Steel Soul profile, prioritize Masks, Needle upgrades, Bellways, and safe benches, and leave optional high-risk encounters until stronger.

Obtain Silkspear and defeat Bell Beast; acquire Swift Step in Deep Docks; obtain Drifter's Cloak in Far Fields; acquire Cling Grip in Shellwood; defeat Widow for Needolin; defeat Last Judge to enter the Citadel.
Defeat Cogwork Dancers, gather the three Citadel melodies, play the Threefold Melody, defeat Lace in the Cradle, then defeat Grand Mother Silk and choose Bind without a permanent death.

achievements.description: Achieve 100% game completion and finish the game in Steel Soul mode
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its prerequisites are available.
achievements.summary: Reach 100% completion and finish an ending on one Steel Soul profile without a permanent death.

guide.context: Steel Soul changes Dead Bug's Purse to Shell Satchel and adds exclusive content, but the same exact 100-point completion categories apply. Steel-only Wishes and bosses are not extra percentage.

steps.text: Use a conservative area route and buy Masks plus Needle upgrades before boss and platforming risks.

Collect 51 Tools, six Silk Skills, four Crafting Kits, four Tool Pouches, three Silk Hearts, six non-default Crests, seven counted abilities, 20 Mask Shards, 18 Spool Fragments, four Needle upgrades, and Everbloom without a permanent death.
Use Farsight to confirm 100%, then finish an available ending without a permanent death.
